result.api_response: StreamGenerate endpoint called but response blocked by APF. Page stayed on /app (no conversation URL redirect). 21 requests, 13.1 kB.
result.console_error: 3 errors, 6 issues (3 page errors, 1 breaking change). CSP violations: 'The action has been blocked', 'Fetch API cannot load' (Refused to connect, violates CSP connect-src 'self'), 'Connecting to [app:1] violates Content Security Policy'.
result.input_method: Type tool into Gemini prompt edit field + click '메시지 보내기' button

notes: Gemini h2_mode=2 + h2_end_stream=1 + h2_goaway=0 + h2_hold_request=0 (NEW keep-alive STRATEGY): BLOCKED but NO visible warning. StreamGenerate called but APF intercepted response. Page stayed on welcome screen with prompt still in input field — no conversation created, no error displayed to user. CSP violations from APF response. Similar to h2_mode=1 (#288) but no ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR cascade — connection stayed alive. Improvement: page remains functional (no crash/error page).
